hooks.command: file_path=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.env($|\.)|\/env\/'; then echo "🚫 환경변수 파일 직접 편집이 차단되었습니다: $file_path\n필요하면 config/env/ 경로를 확인하세요."; exit 2; fi

file_path=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then cd /Users/arisnoba/Documents/GitHub/bnb-renewal && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -30; fi
